title: Legendary Arena Match Setup
description: Deterministic, versioned configuration for initializing a single Legendary Arena match. The composition block is passed verbatim as boardgame.io setupData (MatchSetupConfig). Envelope fields (schemaVersion, setupId, etc.) are consumed by the server before reaching the engine.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the match setup schema.

setupId.description: Globally unique identifier for this match setup instance.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this match setup was created.

seed.description: Deterministic random seed. Intended root of all randomness for setup, replay, and simulation. NOTE: boardgame.io manages its own internal PRNG; wiring this seed into ctx.random is a future integration concern.

playerCount.description: Exact number of players for the match. Must respect LegendaryGame.minPlayers (1) and maxPlayers (5).

themeId.description: Optional theme identifier providing narrative intent (non-authoritative). References a THEME-SCHEMA entry.

expansions.description: Enabled content expansions. Defines the total content pool available to this match. Must include at least one (e.g. 'base').

heroSelectionMode.description: Optional rule mode indicating how the composition's hero selection is interpreted. v1 allows exactly one value; the field is backward compatible (absent means GROUP_STANDARD).

composition.description: Authoritative component selection for this match. Maps 1:1 to MatchSetupConfig (the engine's 9-field contract). Frozen once the match begins. Passed as boardgame.io setupData.

schemeId.description: Scheme ext_id (set-qualified '{setAbbr}/{slug}') selected for this match. D-24018 / D-10014.

mastermindId.description: Mastermind ext_id (set-qualified '{setAbbr}/{slug}') selected for this match. D-24018 / D-10014.

villainGroupIds.description: Villain group ext_ids (set-qualified '{setAbbr}/{slug}') included in the villain deck. D-24018 / D-10014.

henchmanGroupIds.description: Henchman group ext_ids (set-qualified '{setAbbr}/{slug}') included in the villain deck. D-24018 / D-10014.

heroDeckIds.description: Hero deck ext_ids (set-qualified '{setAbbr}/{slug}') available in the HQ and player decks. D-24018 / D-10014.

bystandersCount.description: Number of bystander cards in the game.

woundsCount.description: Number of wound cards in the game.

officersCount.description: Number of S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer cards in the game.

sidekicksCount.description: Number of Sidekick cards in the game.
